package rulecoverage

func PositiveMapBasedUpdatesPassedFromHandlerToRepository() string {
    ruleID := "map_based_updates_passed_from_handler_to_repository"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Update maps built from request payloads and passed through layers without typed ownership."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
